notes:
## Bug Fixes
- **Plugin not found error**: Fixed Export JSON/CSV and Cheat Sheet failing with 'Plugin not found' — `tauri-plugin-fs` was missing plugin initialization
- **Drag & drop image**: Added document-level drag events so images dragged from Windows Explorer are now properly detected
- **Cheat Sheet**: Fixed not working (was using blob URL which fails in Tauri WebView)
- **Export JSON/CSV**: Now shows native save dialog and confirms file location
- **Import from Beeftext**: File filter changed to 'All Files' (was only .json)
- **Delete All Snippets**: Fixed silently failing (was calling non-existent command)
